name: Udang Kari (Indonesian Prawn Curry)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil and lightly saute onion and garlic.
2. Add garlic, turmeric, cumin, and lemon grass. Stir and add sambal oelek, shrimp paste, and salt. Stir again.
3. Add coconut milk and bring to a boil. Lower heat and add prawns. Simmer uncovered for 15-20 minutes.
4. Serve with rice.
